setup: Worker claims task is done, state.json shows dod_checklist all true
assertions: Runs 'npm run build' (not trusting worker output)

setup: package.json has 'test:e2e' script
assertions: Checks package.json scripts for e2e/playwright keywords
Runs the E2E script if found
Skips gracefully if no E2E script exists

setup: Task has 3 acceptance criteria in tasks.json
assertions: Marks each as VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or MISSING
PARTIAL means test exists but incomplete

setup: Verification complete
npm test passes, but 1 of 3 criteria has no test
assertions: Specific gaps listed with file:line or missing test description
Does NOT round up to PASS

setup: Verification complete with PASS verdict
Worker missing an edge case test
assertions: Gaps include file:line or specific test description

setup: SPEC.md has 3 E2E scenarios for this task
assertions: Marks each as COVERED or MISSING
Checks E2E scenarios, not just acceptance criteria

setup: Task description has '/ui-reverse-engineering', no ui-measurements.json exists in .ralph/workers/worker-2/
assertions: Marks Skill Artifacts section as MISSING
Verdict is FAIL or INCOMPLETE (not PASS)

setup: Task has '/transition-reverse-engineering', transition-measurements.json exists but contains {}
UI task, no visual-regression.json exists
assertions: Marks Visual Regression as MISSING in report

setup: visual-regression.json exists with overall_verdict:'fail', hero section mismatch
visual-regression.json exists with overall_verdict:'pass', screenshots present in both directories
assertions: Does not flag as a gap

setup: npm test exits with error
assertions: Tells worker to fix tests before calling Architect

setup: All tests pass, build passes, all criteria VERIFIED, all E2E COVERED, skill artifacts present, visual regression passed
state.json dod_checklist.npm_test:true but npm test actually fails
assertions: Reports FAIL based on actual run, NOT worker's claim

setup: package.json has 'test:e2e', 'test:e2e:mobile', 'test:e2e:auth'
assertions: Runs the most relevant one to the task

setup: UI task, no E2E script in package.json
assertions: Notes 'no E2E script found' as a gap in the report

setup: One missing test
assertions: Gap includes file:line or where test should exist

setup: SPEC.md has specific done criteria
assertions: References its criteria in the report

setup: CLAUDE.md has specific constraints
